stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP file 2.4. Given the following information, calculate the Ground range.

Aeroplane Mass at start-up: 3663 lb
Aviation gasoline fuel load (density 6 lb/gal): 74 US gal
Take-off altitude: Sea Level
Headwind component: 30 kt
Cruising altitude: 8000 ft
Power setting: Full throttle 2300 RPM 20° lean of peak EGT
